name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-assisted presentation builder that skips the generic filler and keeps your ideas sharp.
problem: Most AI presentation tools produce generic, template-heavy slides that dilute original thinking. Chronicle 2.0 addresses the gap between speed and quality by using AI to structure and design decks without overriding the creator's voice. This is critical for teams who need polished outputs fast but can't afford to look like everyone else.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with structured narrative flow
Creating sales enablement presentations that stay on-brand
Producing internal strategy or roadmap decks quickly
Turning raw notes or briefs into designed slide presentations
